case_title: OLIVIA LIZOTTE ET AL VS. MIA EHSANI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OLIVIA LIZOTTE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LEGAL AIDZ, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY OLIVIA LIZOTTE (OWNER). DEFENDANT MIA EHSANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDERSON EHSANI FIDUCIARY SERVICES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MIA EHSANI (OWNER). MATTER WAS HEARD AT 10:00AM AS AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES DUE TO CONFLICT WITH PLAINTIFF THOUGHT THE MATTER WAS TRANSFERRED TO HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 504 @9:30AM WHEN COURTROOM CLERK WAS ADDRESSING PARTIES IN A DIFFERENT CASE ON CALENDAR. DEFENDANT PROVIDE CONSENT TO COURTROOM CLERK TO SIGN FOR SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DUE TO TECHNICAL ISSUE SHE WAS NOT ABLE TO SIGN DEFENDANTS ORALLY STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$160.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED: "FILED BY FAX" SERVED SEP-17-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON EHSANI FIDUCIARY SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) OLIVIA LIZOTTE, OWNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGAL AIDZ, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$160.00); DOCUMENT STAMPED: "FILED BY FAX" SERVED SEP-17-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EHSANI, MIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIZOTTE, OLIVIA LEGAL AIDZ, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EHSANI, MIA ANDERSON EHSANI FIDUCIARY SERVICES THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT A PERSONAL SERVICES AGREEMENT WAS REACHED BETWEEN ANY PLAINTIFF AND ANY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MAY PURSUE A CLAIM FOR COMPENSATION IN THE APPROPRIATE PROBATE COURT IF PLAINTIFF BELIEVES SHE OR HER COMPANY ARE STILL OWED MONEY BY DEFENDANT OR HER COMPANY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY LIZOTTE, OLIVIA LEGAL AIDZ, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EHSANI, MIA ANDERSON EHSANI FIDUCIARY SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MIA EHSANI, OWNER. FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSON EHSANI FIDUCIARY SERVICES
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIZOTTE, OLIVIA LEGAL AIDZ, LLC
